nasb.text: “But now ask the beasts, and let them teach you; And the birds of the heavens, and let them tell you.

esv.text: “But ask the beasts, and they will teach you; the birds of the heavens, and they will tell you;

cnv.text: 你且問走獸，走獸必指教你， 又問空中的飛鳥，飛鳥必告訴你；

ccb.text: “你去问走兽，它们会指教你； 问天上的飞禽，它们会告诉你；
